headline: Stress Management Techniques
description: Stress management combines physiological regulation (breathing, exercise, sleep) with cognitive reframing (CBT techniques, mindfulness). Key methods: MBSR (8-week mindfulness program), CBT cognitive restructuring, progressive muscle relaxation, exercise, sleep hygiene. Chronic stress differentiated from acute stress. Burnout (WHO ICD-11): occupational phenomenon from chronic workplace stress.

citation.name: Full Catastrophe Living (Jon Kabat-Zinn, Revised Ed)
Feeling Good: The New Mood Therapy (David Burns)
